title: Legalisation of UK documents for use in the State of Qatar
body: "The first is to get the document legalised by the Legalisation Office in the UK. The second is to have your document legalised by the Qatar Embassy in London. Once the FCDO-UK signature is attested at the Qatar Embassy in London you or your employer can take your document straight to the Ministry of Foreign Affairs for attestation, the third step. "
